content:
# Recommendations â€” next plan iter (post iter-020)

## Closest-to-completion / next critical path
node-4 `tildePullbackComparison_stalk_isIso` is now gated on a SHARP, well-understood set: the
(a1)/(a2) sheafification-stalk substrate wall, then (d2) target, then (d3), then final assembly.
(c)+(d1) are LANDED. The frontier (`archon dag-query frontier`) shows three node-4 sub-lemmas ready:
- **(a1)** `lem:tilde_pullback_stalk_sheafificationStalk` (effort 405) â€” the SOLE deep substrate gap:
  "sheafification of a MODULE presheaf is stalkwise-iso" (Mathlib only `Type`-valued).
- **(a2)** `lem:tilde_pullback_stalk_presheafPullbackStalk` (effort 475).
- **(d3)** `lem:tilde_pullback_stalk_comparison_commutes` (effort 575) â€” see "Blocked" below; its
  `target_map` is (d2)'s map, gated on (a1). Do NOT dispatch (d3) before (a1)+(d2).

### Action: Mathlib-analogist BEFORE opening (a1) scope
Per iter-020 plan's own next-iter note and the iter-019 progress-critic: dispatch a **mathlib-analogist**
(cross-domain or api-alignment) on "stalk of sheafification / sheaf-pullback-as-sheafification for a
MODULE-valued presheaf" BEFORE writing an (a1) prover lane â€” avoid a wall-discovery iter. Mathlib has
`TopCat.Presheaf.stalkPullbackIso`, the `Type`-valued sheafification-stalk iso, and
`â€¦/ModuleCat/Sheaf/PullbackContinuous.lean` (pullbackâ†”sheafification) as SEPARATE pieces. The question
is whether the module-valued stalk-of-sheafification iso can be assembled (forget to `Type`/`Ab` and
transport, or via `sheafToPresheaf` faithfulness). If genuinely absent, effort-break (a1) finely.

## Coverage debt â€” 3 unmatched `lean_aux` nodes (author blueprint blocks)
`archon dag-query unmatched` â†’ all proved, sorry-free, NO blueprint block. Planner authors prose
(review agent does not). All in `Kemeny_PeerDependencies.tex`:
1. **`extendScalars_unit_isLocalizedModule`** (SUBSTANTIVE â€” lean-vs-blueprint MAJOR): the Mâ†’M_f-at-
   powers-of-f leg, = `IsLocalization.tensorProduct_isLocalizedModule` transported across a
   `TensorProduct.congr` defeq bridge (extendScalars carrier's restrictScalars first factor â‰ rfl the
   Algebra-module one). Give it its own lemma block AND **add it to (d1)'s `\uses`** (currently (d1)
   `\uses{mathlib:tilde_stalk_localization, lem:tilde_pullback_stalk_localizationTransitivity}` glosses
   this leg as given). `\uses{mathlib:IsLocalization.tensorProduct_isLocalizedModule,
   mathlib:extendRestrictScalarsAdj}`. Do NOT add it to (d2)'s `\uses`.
2. **`instModuleStalkOfTilde`** â€” defeq shim of Mathlib's tilde-stalk `Module` instance, re-keyed for
   the `CommRingCat.of` presentation. `\uses{mathlib:tilde_stalk_localization}`. One-line block (or a
   `% NOTE:` on the `mathlib:tilde_stalk_localization` anchor noting the `.of`-keyed project shims).
3. **`instIsLocalizedModuleStalkOfTilde`** â€” defeq shim of Mathlib's `IsLocalizedModule (tilde.toStalk)`
   instance, same `CommRingCat.of` re-keying. `\uses{mathlib:tilde_stalk_localization}`.

## Blocked â€” do NOT re-dispatch as-is
- **(d3) `tilde_pullback_stalk_comparison_commutes`**: NOT a clean prover lane yet. Two real
  obstructions: (i) `target_map` needs the `toPresheaf`â†”`moduleSpecÎ“Functor` germ bridge + Î±_M germ-
  naturality through `stalkFunctor`; (ii) its `target_map` IS (d2)'s structure map, gated on the
  OUT-OF-SCOPE (a1) wall. **Defer (d3) alongside (d2) until (a1) lands.** NEVER state (d3) as
  `target_map := (Î±_M)_x âˆ˜ source_map` (circular, proves nothing).

## Reusable patterns discovered this iter (added to Knowledge Base)
- **`CommRingCat.of`-keyed instance shim**: Mathlib instances keyed on an opaque `CommRingCat` var miss
  the discr-tree when the ring is `CommRingCat.of A`; re-expose via `inferInstanceAs` on the underlying
  un-coerced form (`moduleStructurePresheaf`/`StructureSheaf.toStalkâ‚—`). Defeq, no diamond.
- **extendScalars unit as a localization**: bridge `tensorProduct_isLocalizedModule` to the extendScalars
  carrier via `TensorProduct.congr (Î± := id-on-carrier R-equiv, map_smul' = Algebra.smul_def)` +
  `of_linearEquiv`; the two tensor presentations are defeq-not-rfl.
- **Feeding the T-free transitivity lemma from a tilde stalk**: supply the restricted R-module via
  `Module.compHom _ Ï†` (NOT `inferInstanceAs (restrictScalars â€¦)` â€” only `compHom` gives a `rfl` tower)
  + `IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul (fun _ _ => rfl)`; re-type `g`/`h` to plain carriers; state the
  conclusion through the `restrictScalars` FUNCTOR; close with `convert _ using 1`.

## LOW (cosmetic)
- lean-auditor flagged 2 stale iteration-diary phrases (`iter-020`/`iter-019 blocker`) in permanent
  Foundations docstrings (lines ~1666/1671). Cosmetic; fold into a future docstring pass if a prover
  touches that region. Not worth a dedicated lane.
